prompt: A two-panel Japanese manga page in a dramatic, semi-realistic black-and-white ink style with warm sepia sunset tones. The setting is a public park at dusk with 1 wooden bench on the far left, 4 glowing lampposts, leafy trees, a dirt walking path, distant city buildings, and a small playground with slides in the background. In the top panel, a small Jack Russell Terrier stands left of center on a leash, just after pooping on the ground; there is 1 small poop pile near its hind legs with comic emphasis marks. The dog has a white coat with dark patches, a collar and leash, eyes squeezed shut, and a mischievous, satisfied expression while one hind leg is lifted and the tail is wagging, suggesting the start of a backward kick. To the right, a young woman with shoulder-length wavy hair crouches while holding an open plastic poop bag in one hand and the leash loop in the other. She wears a cable-knit cardigan, a long floral dress with a ribbon at the collar, and low heels. Her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur. A large speech balloon in the upper right contains vertical Japanese text: 「よしよし。…さて、ササっと片付けて帰ろっか。」. In the bottom panel, create a sudden close-up action moment: the dog, now on the left side in a low aggressive stance, glares intensely with sharply angled brows, one sweat drop, and puffs of breath from its nose, as if bracing and kicking dirt backward with force. Explosive speed lines radiate across the frame, and a cloud of sand and grit bursts toward the crouching woman on the right. The woman recoils slightly, still holding the bag, with a shocked thought balloon near her head containing vertical Japanese text: 「あ、まずい……」. Next to the dog, place a jagged impact shout balloon with large Japanese text: 「フンッ！」. Emphasize the absurd humor and motion, with detailed fur, textured ground, dynamic debris, expressive manga screentones, bold panel borders, and cinematic action-comedy timing.
